summary: My Space Page Phase 1 & 2 Testing Complete - All features verified. 3-section layout (In Progress, Completed, Failed) working correctly with proper counts. Completed cards have Watch/Download/WhatsApp buttons. Failed cards show error messages and Retry buttons. Notification toggle and Refresh buttons present. WhatsApp share via POST /api/story-engine/share-link/{job_id} API working correctly. Auto-redirect to My Space on generation start verified in code.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user data (50 jobs: 10 in-progress, 45 completed, 5 failed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: My Space page fully tested. All 3 sections (In Progress, Completed, Failed) render correctly with proper counts. WhatsApp share API (POST /api/story-engine/share-link/{job_id}) returns share_url and whatsapp_url. Auto-redirect to /app/my-space?projectId= on generation start is implemented at StoryVideoPipeline.js line 698.

tests: In Progress section shows with count badge (10 items)
Completed section shows with count badge (45 items)
Failed section shows with count badge (5 items)
Section headers are clickable for collapse/expand
Cards show title and progress percentage
Animated progress bars with pulsing indicators
Completed status and time ago visible
Cards show error messages (e.g., 'ASSEMBLING_VIDEO failed after 2 attempts: FFmpeg stitch failed')
Retry button visible for recoverable jobs
Clicking section header toggles collapse state
Chevron icon changes direction on toggle
whatsapp_url opens wa.me with encoded text
Idempotent - same share_id on multiple calls
Jobs have required fields (job_id, title, status, progress, created_at)
Status values are valid (QUEUED, PROCESSING, COMPLETED, PARTIAL, FAILED)
Toast message 'Redirecting to My Space to track progress...' shown
